title: Silky Smooth Sardinian Persian Cucumber Panettone
description: This dish is a unique combination of Sardinian and Mediterranean flavors, featuring Persian cucumber in a velvety panettone, perfect for a solo dinner. The umami flavor comes from the braise and Mediterranean-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Braise the sliced Persian cucumber in olive oil over medium heat until it is tender and lightly browned.
Add the minced garlic and chopped onion to the pan and cook until the onion is translucent.
Stir in the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add the vegetable broth to the pan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the mixture for 10 minutes.
Stir in the shaved grana padano cheese until it is melted and smooth.
Add the cubed panettone bread to the pan and toss until it is well coated with the cheese mixture.
Season the mixture with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with chopped fresh parsley.
Serve the Silky Smooth Sardinian Persian Cucumber Panettone hot.
